content.title: Texture, color, and craftsmanship for every project
content.subtitle: From classic broom finishes to decorative stamped concrete, Maxima Concrete delivers the finish options that bring your driveway, patio, or commercial slab to life across Central Ohio.

content.heading: Our Concrete Finishes
content.subheading: From classic broom to decorative stamped concrete, explore the finish options Maxima Concrete delivers across Central Ohio.

items.question: Which concrete finish is right for my project?
items.answer: It depends on your style, budget, and where it will be used. We'll walk you through broom, smooth, stamped, colored, buff wash, and exposed aggregate options during your free consultation.

items.question: Are decorative finishes as durable as standard concrete?
items.answer: Yes. Every finish is applied over our high-strength, fiber-reinforced mix, so you get lasting durability with the look you want.

items.question: Can finishes be matched to my existing concrete?
items.answer: In most cases, yes. We can color- and texture-match new work to blend seamlessly with your current surfaces.

items.question: Do decorative finishes require special maintenance?
items.answer: Just periodic cleaning and resealing every 2–3 years to keep colors and textures looking their best.
